title: Where coffee never goes extinct
subtitle: Come live a Mesozoic experience with giant flavors and lots of fun.
description: At the house of the Frappesaurio you'll find a cozy place to enjoy coffee, frappes, and drinks made with care.

menu.title: Our drinks
menu.subtitle: A selection designed to enjoy every moment.

desc.frappes: Creamy and refreshing frappes for any time of the day.
desc.coffee: Coffee prepared with carefully selected beans.
desc.tea: Aromatic teas and herbal infusions to enjoy slowly.
desc.beans: Coffee beans to take the experience home.

experience.title: A place to share
experience.text: We want every visit to feel special. A cozy space where you can enjoy a good drink, talk with friends, and relax.
